name: node-pilot
description: A GitHub Copilot canvas extension to build, lint, type-check, test and run JavaScript / Node.js / web apps — and update dependencies without breaking them — from the Copilot app side panel.
author: Yohan Lasorsa

scripts.check: node --check extension.mjs && for f in src/*.mjs; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done
